vision.title: Our Vision
vision.statement: We are a community of believers who seek to live the values of the Gospel every day — through prayer, service, and love for our neighbors.

faith.title: Faith
faith.description: We believe in a living God who works in the hearts and lives of people through the Holy Spirit.

word.title: The Word of God
word.description: The Bible remains the foundation of our faith life, the source of wisdom and guidance.

community.title: Community
community.description: We are a spiritual family that supports one another in joy and in suffering.

service.title: Service
service.description: We believe that every person has a gift to offer and that service is an expression of love.

meeting.title: Weekly Schedule
meeting.note: All services take place at the church building. Visitors are welcome.

social.title: Social Aid Center
social.description: We distribute food packages and clothing to needy families in the community every month.

romanian.title: Romanian Language Courses for Immigrants
romanian.description: Romanian language courses for immigrant speakers of English and French.

renovation.title: Meeting Hall Renovation
renovation.description: We are modernizing the church's meeting spaces to create a more welcoming and accessible environment.

sermons.title: Sermons
sermons.subtitle: Listen to our messages on Spotify.

donations.title: Donations
donations.subtitle: Support the church's work through your contribution. Every donation helps the community grow and serve.
donations.cardSubtitle: Fast and secure, directly from your browser.
donations.cardNote: You will be redirected to a secure payment platform.

footer.tagline: A community of believers in Romania.
